name: Catalan Salad W/Cilantro Cream Dressing
recipeInstructions:
Wash and dry the lettuce. Arrange on a platter or individual serving plates.
Sprinkle with almonds, green onions, and orange slices (cut in half).
In a small bowl, combine finely minced onion, cilantro, and parsley.
Mix in lemon juice, extra virgin olive oil, and whisk to blend.
Let set until ready to serve, up to an hour.
At serving time, whisk in light cream. Add salt and white pepper to taste.
Drizzle over salad and serve without tossing.
